symbol_verify.notes: Playwright patterns simulated as dicts; demos cover role, wait, retry, captcha handoff.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Refleja la UI accesible y suele ser más estable
selfcheck.note: Theory prefer get_by_role over fragile CSS.
Theory + final demo human_handoff on captcha.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Buscar integración no-UI antes de automatizar el browser

exercises.code:
nodes = [{"role": "link", "name": "Inicio", "id": "n1"}]
n = next(x for x in nodes if x["role"] == "link" and x["name"] == "Inicio")
print(n["id"])

strats = ["css", "role", "testid"]
pref = ["role", "testid", "css"]
print(sorted(strats, key=lambda s: pref.index(s)))
exercises.note: Hints preferred order role testid css.

exercises.code:
expected, actual = "Portal demo", "Portal demo"
print("pass" if expected == actual else "fail")

import hashlib
print(hashlib.sha256(b"data").hexdigest()[:8])

state = {"token": "t"}
print("reuse" if state.get("token") else "login")

state = "anonymous"
state = "authenticated"
print(state)

ev = {"trace": "a.zip", "screenshot": "b.png", "error": "x"}
print(sorted(ev.keys()))

logs = ["ok", "ERR timeout", "nav"]
print([x for x in logs if "ERR" in x])

err = "stale"
action = "goto_home" if err == "stale" else "continue"
print(action)

errors = ["timeout", "timeout", "timeout"]
result = "fail"
attempts = 0
for e in errors:
    attempts += 1
    if e == "ok":
        result = "ok"
        break
    if attempts >= 3:
        result = "fail"
        break
print(attempts, result)

api = True
print("api" if api else "rpa")

decision = {"method": "rpa", "reason": "no_api"}
print(decision)

captcha = True
print("human_handoff" if captcha else "continue")

payload = {"url": "https://demo.example.pe", "step": "export", "screenshot": "s.png"}
print(payload)

responses.forbidden_ack: Do not use knowledge outside this packet.
